---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem would this feature solve? Describe the use case.

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen. Include API shapes, UI
mockups, or workflow sketches if helpful.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered other ways to solve this? Why were they rejected?

## Related

- Links to related issues, discussions, or ADRs.

## Additional Context

Add any other context here.
